title: Sale of drug as cure or treatment
doc_html:
§1121.9. Sale of drug as cure or treatment

            No person shall sell any drug, medicine, or preparation advertised, called for, or labeled as a cure or treatment of a venereal disease, except on written prescription of a licensed physician.

            Redesignated from R.S. 40:1066 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1121.9.  Sale of drug as cure or treatment
No person shall sell any drug, medicine, or preparation advertised, called for, or
labeled as a cure or treatment of a venereal disease, except on written prescription of a
licensed physician.
Redesignated from R.S. 40:1066 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
